name: exam2pdf: Downloading PDF Certificates
description: Shows teachers where to find and download PDF certificates on the quiz report page.

steps.title: PDF Certificates Section
steps.content:
Scroll down to find the PDF certificates section below the standard quiz report.

It shows all generated certificates for this quiz with learner name, date, and a download icon.

steps.title: Download Individual PDFs
steps.content: Click the download icon next to any learner to download their individual PDF certificate.

steps.title: Bulk Download as ZIP
steps.content: Use the Download all as ZIP button to get all certificates at once — handy for archiving or printing.

steps.title: Customize Settings
steps.content: Want to change what appears in the PDFs or who can download them? Go to Quiz → More → PDF Certificate settings to override the defaults for this quiz.
